sessionStart.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor session-start'

sessionEnd.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor session-end'

beforeSubmitPrompt.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor before-submit-prompt'

stop.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor stop'

preCompact.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor pre-compact'

subagentStart.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor subagent-start'

subagentStop.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v story >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec story hooks cursor subagent-stop'
